title: No More Overlays
description: Allows the user to toggle all of Minecraft's screen effects.
body:
No More Overlays lets users toggle on or off every Minecraft screen overlay effect. To toggle different overlays, No More Overlays provides an easy-to-use config in the Forge "mods" UI or Mod Menu for Fabric/Quilt.

The overlays that can be toggled are as follows: - Underwater Vignette - Totem Popping - Darkness - Dim lighting vignette - Fire - Elder Guardian - Spyglass - Nether Portal - Nausea - Freezing - Carved Pumpkin ### Dependencies This mod requires Cloth Config API on Forge and NeoForge, and, in addition, Mod Menu and Fabric API on Fabric and Quilt. It also requires Architectury API for versions 1.0.0 and 1.0.1 of NoMoreOverlays.
